page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A long-read mapper desigend to align pacbilo or oxford nanopore to a reference genome optimized for structural variation detection
page_metadata.biotools__summary: An algorithm to map third generation long-read sequencing data (PacBio and Oxford Nanopore) to a reference genome with a focus on reads that span structural variation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An algorithm to map third generation long-read sequencing data (PacBio and Oxford Nanopore) to a reference genome with a focus on reads that span structural variation.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: CoNvex Gap-cost alignMents for Long Reads
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: An algorithm to map third generation long-read sequencing data (PacBio and Oxford Nanopore) to a reference genome with a focus on reads that span structural variation.
